---
title: 'Start Here'
date: '2018-08-12T07:19:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Freedom Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4943330173335576951'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Freedom Center/feed.atom'
---

<h3 style="text-align: left;">Start Here: Welcome to The Freedom Center</h3><div>As of September 2023, this site serves as a growing resources center to provide information about and links to the best of biblical studies and psychological research around mental/emotional health and becoming a vibrant part of Yahweh's community.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>Eventually, as time allows, we would like this site to include a synthesis of our own research into these topics... as outlined below and in our <a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/p/eleutheria-vision-and-values.html" target="_blank">Visions and Values</a>.</div><div><br /></div><div>For now, check out the links provided on our <a href="http://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/p/resources-autism-adhd-mental-health.html" target="_blank">Resources</a> page.</div><div><br /></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">What We're About</h3><h4 style="text-align: left;">Vision: Transform your heart and mind at The Freedom Center.</h4><div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Theme: Eleutheria: Because true freedom comes from within and above.</h4><h4 style="text-align: left;">Mission: Uniting the wisdom of the Bible and modern psychology for a happier, healthier you.</h4></div><h4 style="text-align: left;">Core Values:</h4><div style="text-align: left;"><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Integrity: Backed by credible research in psychology and biblical studies.</li><li>Compassion: A nurturing place to find empathy and understanding.</li><li>Freedom: Your journey toward mental and spiritual liberation starts here.</li></ul><div><br /></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">What You'll Find Here</h3></div><div style="text-align: left;"><ul style="text-align: left;"><li>Academic Insight: Deep-dives into biblical studies and psychology.</li><li>Theology of Freedom: Scriptural roots of "Eleutheria" explored.</li><li>Practical Wisdom: Mindful prayer guides and cognitive therapy resources.</li><li>Personal Stories: Real accounts of finding spiritual and mental peace.</li><li>Community: A safe space to share and seek guidance.</li></ul><div><br /></div><h3 style="text-align: left;">What's Eleutheria?</h3>Eleutheria is all about freedom. It's a Greek term picked up by biblical authors to describe a multifaceted liberation that transcends the spiritual, mental, and even physical realms. Think of it as freedom 2.0—where ancient wisdom meets modern well-being. Read more about that on our <a href="https://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/p/eleutheria-vision-and-values.html" target="_blank">Visions and Values</a> page.</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;"><h3 style="text-align: left;">Interested in going deeper?</h3>Check out the <a href="http://thefreedomcenterllc.blogspot.com/p/resources-autism-adhd-mental-health.html" target="_blank">Resources</a> page.&nbsp;</div>
